question_intent: Average goals scored by teams that have at least one coach who won an award in the Eastern Conference

plan.question_intent: Average goals scored by teams that have at least one coach who won an award in the Eastern Conference
plan.detail_query: SELECT leaf_1.tmid, leaf_1.year, leaf_1.name, leaf_1.w, leaf_1.gf FROM (SELECT t.tmid, t.year, t.name, t.w, t.gf, COUNT(DISTINCT c.coachid) AS all_star_coaches FROM teams AS t JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code WHERE (ab.code = 'EC') GROUP BY t.tmid, t.year, t.name, t.w, t.gf HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT c.coachid) >= 1)) AS leaf_1

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT t.tmid, t.year, t.name, t.w, t.gf, COUNT(DISTINCT c.coachid) AS all_star_coaches
join_clauses: JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
blocks.group_by_clause: GROUP BY t.tmid, t.year, t.name, t.w, t.gf

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE (ab.code = 'EC')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE (ab.code = 'EC' OR ab.code = 'CC')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE (ab.code = 'EC' OR ab.code = 'WA')
LIMIT 5

SELECT t.tmid, t.year, t.name, t.w, t.gf, COUNT(DISTINCT c.coachid) AS all_star_coaches
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE (ab.code = 'EC' OR ab.code = 'WA')
GROUP BY t.tmid, t.year, t.name, t.w, t.gf
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT c.coachid) >= 1)

SELECT t.tmid, t.year, t.name, t.w, t.gf, COUNT(DISTINCT c.coachid) AS all_star_coaches
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE (ab.code = 'EC' OR ab.code = 'WA')
GROUP BY t.tmid, t.year, t.name, t.w, t.gf
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT c.coachid) >= 1)

build_logs.notes: Average goals scored by teams with at least one coach who won an award in the Eastern Conference

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT t.tmid, t.year, t.name, t.w, t.gf, COUNT(DISTINCT c.coachid) AS all_star_coaches
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE (ab.code = 'EC' OR ab.code = 'WA')
GROUP BY t.tmid, t.year, t.name, t.w, t.gf
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT c.coachid) >= 1)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.gf)
FROM (SELECT t.tmid, t.year, t.name, t.w, t.gf, COUNT(DISTINCT c.coachid) AS all_star_coaches
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE (ab.code = 'EC' OR ab.code = 'WA')
GROUP BY t.tmid, t.year, t.name, t.w, t.gf
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT c.coachid) >= 1)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.gf)
FROM (SELECT t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.w, t.l, t.gf, t.ga, COUNT(DISTINCT a.coachid) AS all_star_coaches
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (t.confid = 'CC')
GROUP BY t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.w, t.l, t.gf, t.ga
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT a.coachid) >= 1)) AS leaf_1

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.gf) AS avg_goals_scored
FROM (SELECT t.name AS team_name, t.year, t.gf
FROM teams AS t
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE ((t.lgid = 'NHL')) AND ((t.confid = ab.code)) AND ((ab.fullname = 'Eastern Conference')) AND ((a.award = 'Jack Adams'))) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average goals-for (GF) value across all teams that played in either the EC or WA conference, had at least one coach, and are grouped by team ID, year, name, wins, and goals-for?
